_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 3 score-contribution tiers (tier_1/tier_2/tier_3) in backed_clinical_studies.score_contribution. Reflects computed evidence bracket. UI-bound vocab — carries DISPLAY CONTRACT. NOTE: per metadata description in source data, this field is a metadata label not used by the scorer; it's display-only.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for score-contribution tier presentation in evidence cards.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/backed_clinical_studies.json `score_contribution` field (197 entries; live: tier_1=163, tier_2=24, tier_3=10).

score_contribution_tiers.name: Tier 1 evidence
score_contribution_tiers.notes: Highest-quality study tier (most common). Studies in this tier contribute the most to the evidence score.

score_contribution_tiers.name: Tier 2 evidence
score_contribution_tiers.notes: Mid-tier studies. Contribute to the evidence score but with reduced weight relative to tier 1.

score_contribution_tiers.name: Tier 3 evidence
score_contribution_tiers.notes: Lowest weighted tier. Studies contribute minimally to the evidence score; treated as supporting context only.
